title: What’s new in Gemma 4?
summary: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4, a new family of open models featuring advanced reasoning, native vision and audio capabilities, and agentic tool-use functionality. The models are designed to run efficiently across devices ranging from high-end workstations to mobile phones.
